title: A2A v1 type surfaces (FRC alignment)
description: Minimal JSON Schema fragments synchronized with A2A Protocol canonical types (lf.a2a.v1 / a2a.proto). Normative reference: https://a2a-protocol.org/latest/specification/ — non-normative JSON mirror: https://a2a-protocol.org/latest/spec/a2a.json definitions "Task Status" (state), "Task", "Agent Card". When the protocol enum evolves, update this file and the pinned spec version note in docs/FRC_A2A_EXTENSION.md.

TaskState.title: Task State
TaskState.description: String enum values for TaskStatus.state in A2A JSON (proto TASK_STATE_*). Integer wire values are valid in A2A but not used in FRC surfaces.

TaskStatusSurface.title: Task Status (surface)
TaskStatusSurface.description: Subset of A2A TaskStatus: state (+ optional timestamp). For a full Message on status, use A2A Task payloads or attach out-of-band; FRC envelope does not re-model Part/Message trees.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 — aligns with google.protobuf.Timestamp JSON mapping in A2A.

TaskSurface.title: Task (surface)
TaskSurface.description: Subset of A2A Task for audit correlation: id, optional contextId, required status. Omitted fields (artifacts, history, metadata) MAY be stored in verifier systems per full A2A Task.

AgentCardUri.title: Agent Card locator
AgentCardUri.description: Discovery reference for the remote agent's Agent Card (e.g. https://host/.well-known/agent-card.json per A2A §8). Not the full card; embed full Agent Card only when policy allows.
